title: Gunbuster Eva and Ideon
wikitext:
[]: Gunbuster, Eva and Ideon             Quote Post by Xavierla » Mon Dec 03, 2012 1:54 am I have a very outlandish theory. After re-watching Evangelion and Gunbuster and finishing Ideon it is possible that Shinji and all of the inhabitants of Tokyo 3 are all living a lie. Let me explain. Anno gave us to different endings to Evangelion, both of which could be given many interpretations. Then with rebuild of of evangelion the possibility that after end of evangelion came out there was a rebuild of evangelion yet I have yet to be told how this plays in with the last two episodes. I believe that both the last two episodes and end of evangelion were dreams, that the entire series itself was a dream. Now how does Gunbuster and Ideon play into this. Well we know that there is a 12 thousand year time skip between gunbuster and it's sequel diebuster. Ideon could take place somewhere in between that amount of time and that the mecha Ideon itself could be the most advance evangelion model and buster machine model that was left there for hundreds of years. I also think that while the real eva series may have started in 2015 as well I think that Seele somehow distorted time in Tokyo 3 making the events of evengelion span for years and years and years without anybody noticing. Now with that said if this is only the case for Tokyo 3 then this wouldn't apply to the characters of Gunbuster because they don't live in Tokyo 3 the timeskips are more apparent to them. I am even willing to take this a step further and say that Tetsuo Shima and Akira created the universe where all of this is taking place and that like Ideon, within the long timeskip of Gunbuster and Diebuster lies flcl, gurren lagann and countless other animes. Also, at the end of A.D which would be sometime after diebuster, the gundam timelines begin. Like I said, really outlandish.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Dec 03, 2012 2:00 am Congratulations on laying the groundwork for a modern Wold-Newton . Now go do something interesting with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 03, 2012 2:30 am The super-solenoid power source for Angels and the Harpies is, of course, Spiral Energy. Somewhere down the line, you have to fit in Gurren Lagann as well.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Dec 03, 2012 3:32 am Why are you enabling the troll?

[]: Evangelion is an adapted Gunbuster             Quote Post by Xavierla » Wed Dec 26, 2012 5:00 pm The way I see it, Evangelion is a gender swapped Gunbuster that replaces time dilation drama with teen drama and psychological drama. I also think that Gurren Lagann is a gender swapped Gunbuster on acid.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Dec 26, 2012 5:47 pm Huh, so it's also a non-gender swap Gundam that replaces political drama with teen drama?

[]: Gunbuster, Eva and Ideon             Quote Post by Xavierla » Mon Dec 03, 2012 1:54 am I have a very outlandish theory.
